name: people_basic_data_tool
description:
Returns the core registration dossier for a Brazilian person
per Receita Federal — names, tax-ID status, demographics,
marital status, obit detection, and uniqueness scoring.
Current snapshot only; for change history see
people_historical_basic_data_tool.

Use when:
- "basic registration data for this CPF"
- "who is this person"
- "name / birth date / gender / marital status for this CPF"
- "is this person deceased"

Distinct from:
- people_basic_data_with_configurable_recency_tool — Caller specifies freshness threshold.

Dataset: basic_data · Domain: people

name.description: Nome completo da pessoa para comparação

dateformat.description: Formato dos campos do tipo data.

name: people_kyc_tool
description:
Compliance/KYC dossier for a Brazilian person: full history
of Politically Exposed Person (PEP) designations, sanctions
and restrictions across dozens of regulatory sources,
electoral donation history, and current-state flags for
each. Returns ONE KycRecord keyed to the queried subject.
Shared schema with companies_kyc_tool — compliance consumers
can treat the record shape identically across subject types.

Use when:
- "is this person a PEP"
- "has this entity been sanctioned"
- "what's on this CPF for compliance purposes"
- "run a KYC check on this person"
- "does this person donate to political campaigns"

Distinct from:
- companies_kyc_tool — Same schema but subject is a CNPJ. For compliance workflows requiring both-subject coverage, pair these two tools.
- companies_owners_kyc_tool — Dictionary keyed by owner CPF for ALL owners of a company. Use when the question is about the whole owner group rather than a single named person.
- companies_employees_kyc_tool — Dictionary keyed by employee CPF for all employees.
- companies_economic_group_kyc_tool — Dictionary keyed by member CNPJ across a whole economic group.
- people_first_level_relatives_kyc_tool — Dictionary-scoped KYC across the queried person's first-level relatives — different subject scope (relatives vs self).
- people_political_involvement_tool — Focused on political activity (candidacy, office) rather than PEP/sanction compliance determination.
- people_electoral_donors_tool — Focused electoral-donations tool. Use for donation detail with full per-donation records; use this tool for PEP/sanction compliance where donations are just one dimension.

Dataset: kyc · Domain: people

minmatch.description: Percentual mínimo de similaridade de nome para considerar como correspondência (0-100)

considerexpandedpep.description: Inclui políticos suplentes e juízes estaduais como PEP

name.description: Nome completo da pessoa para comparação

dateformat.description: Formato dos campos do tipo data.

name: companies_processes_tool
description:
Returns the full list of judicial and administrative
lawsuits for a Brazilian company — per-process detail
including number, type, main subject, court, state,
status, parties, updates, petitions, and decisions — plus
entity-level aggregates and rolling-window counters for
recent lawsuit activity.

Use when:
- "what lawsuits is this company involved in?"
- "list the judicial processes for this CNPJ"
- "show me recent lawsuits for this company"
- "what are the details of this company's court cases?"

Distinct from:
- companies_lawsuits_distribution_data_tool — Sibling tool that aggregates the same underlying lawsuits into statistical distributions (by type, court, state, status, etc.) rather than returning per-process detail. Use that one for 'what kinds of lawsuits' or 'breakdown of' questions; use this one for 'list the actual lawsuits'.
- companies_owners_lawsuits_tool — Related tool that returns lawsuits of the company's OWNERS (cross-person aggregation), not lawsuits of the company itself.

Dataset: processes · Domain: companies

returnupdates.description: Inclui lista de atualizações dos processos (impacta tamanho do resultado)

applyFiltersToStats.description: Aplica os filtros informados ao cálculo das estatísticas e contagens

returncvmprocesses.description: Inclui processos da CVM na lista de resultados

updateslimit.description: Número máximo de atualizações de processos a retornar

name: companies_kyc_tool
description:
Compliance/KYC dossier for a single Brazilian person or
company: full history of Politically Exposed Person (PEP)
designations, sanctions and restrictions across dozens of
regulatory sources, electoral donation history, and
current-state flags for each. Returns ONE KycRecord keyed
to the queried subject.

Use when:
- "is this person a PEP?"
- "has this entity been sanctioned?"
- "what's on this CPF/CNPJ for compliance purposes?"
- "run a KYC check on X"
- "does this person donate to political campaigns?"

Distinct from:
- companies_owners_kyc_tool — KYC on each of the company's owners (sócios).
- companies_employees_kyc_tool — KYC on each of the company's employees.
- companies_economic_group_kyc_tool — KYC on each company in the full economic group.

Dataset: kyc · Domain: companies

minmatch.description: Percentual mínimo de similaridade de nome para considerar como correspondência (0-100)

name.description: Nome ou razão social da empresa para comparação

name: companies_economic_group_first_level_tool
description:
Returns the first-level economic group for a Brazilian
company: companies directly connected to the queried CNPJ
via shared ownership or common controlling entity. Smallest
group; default choice when depth is not otherwise specified.

Use when:
- "what other companies are in this group?"
- "what's the total employee count across this company's group?"
- "which companies share owners with this CNPJ?"

Distinct from:
- companies_economic_group_first_level_extended_tool — First-level + per-member extended rollups.
- companies_economic_group_second_level_tool — Second-level: add indirectly connected companies.
- companies_economic_group_second_level_extended_tool — Second-level + per-member extended rollups.
- companies_economic_group_third_level_tool — Third-level: two degrees of indirection.
- companies_economic_group_third_level_extended_tool — Third-level + per-member extended rollups.
- companies_economic_group_full_tool — Full transitive closure (all depths).
- companies_economic_group_full_extended_tool — Full closure + per-member extended rollups.

Dataset: economic_group_first_level · Domain: companies

name: companies_dynamic_qsa_data_tool
description:
Returns a deeply nested dynamic QSA (corporate-structure)
snapshot for the queried Brazilian company with
freshness-control parameters. Surfaces the BasicData
Federal-Revenue snapshot alongside a Relationships
sub-object detailing the entities that directly
constitute the company's corporate structure — walking
relationship edges outward from the queried subject.

Use when:
- "give me the dynamic QSA for this company with freshness control"
- "walk this company's corporate structure with fresh-data control"
- "real-time QSA lookup for this CNPJ"

Distinct from:
- companies_relationships_tool — Standard relationship-walking tool without freshness-control parameters. Prefer this one for ordinary corporate-structure questions.
- companies_company_groups_tool — Company-groups tool for family / economic-group aggregation. Prefer for grouped-structure questions.
- companies_basic_data_tool — Registration snapshot without relationship walk.

Dataset: dynamic_qsa_data · Domain: companies

recency.description: Dias máximos desde a última atualização dos dados de QSA

name: companies_registration_data_tool
description:
Returns a consolidated registration-form-style snapshot of
the queried Brazilian company: BasicData + Emails +
Addresses + Phones combined into a single record. Each
sub-object carries PRIMARY and SECONDARY entries — the
minimum viable contact surface for a company registration
form, not the full history. Use when you need a quick
one-call overview of identity + primary contacts; route
to the specialist *_extended tools when full lists or
per-record detail are needed.

Use when:
- "give me the registration-form view of this CNPJ"
- "primary contact info for this company in one call"
- "quick snapshot of identity + main email / phone / address"
- "one-stop contact summary for this company"

Distinct from:
- companies_basic_data_tool — Returns only the full BasicData registration dossier (richer than this tool's BasicData sub-object), not the consolidated contact snapshot.
- companies_addresses_extended_tool — Returns the full addresses list with per-record detail and passage counters, not just primary/secondary.
- companies_emails_extended_tool — Returns the full emails list, not just primary/secondary.
- companies_phones_extended_tool — Returns the full phones list, not just primary/secondary.
- companies_domains_extended_tool — Domain/website metadata is NOT part of this tool's consolidated view — route to the domains tool separately.

Dataset: registration_data · Domain: companies

name: companies_basic_data_tool
description:
Returns the core registration dossier for a Brazilian
company as of the current BDC ingestion: official name,
trade name, tax ID status, founding/closing dates, age,
tax regime, legal nature, economic activities (CNAE), and
historical-data rollup flags. Current snapshot only — for
change history see companies_history_basic_data_tool.

Use when:
- "what are the basic registration details for this CNPJ?"
- "tell me about this company"
- "give me the registration dossier"
- "what's this company's official name / founding date / tax regime?"

Distinct from:
- companies_history_basic_data_tool — Sibling tool returning the full change log (per-attribute history lists) rather than the current snapshot. Use that one for 'when did X change' questions; use this one for 'what is X today' questions.

Dataset: basic_data · Domain: companies

name.description: Nome ou razão social da empresa para comparação

name: companies_collections_tool
description:
Returns the queried Brazilian company's presence in
private-sector collection processes — whether the company
is currently in collection, lifetime and consecutive-
month counters, source count, and date bounds. Focused
collection-process signal; distinct from public-sector
government debt (government_debtors).

Use when:
- "is this company in collection?"
- "debt collection status for this CNPJ"
- "how long has this company been in collection?"
- "history of private-sector collections"

Distinct from:
- companies_government_debtors_tool — Covers public-sector debt registries; this tool covers private-sector collection processes. Different sources.
- companies_unified_modeling_data_x1_5_tool — Surfaces IsCurrentlyOnCollection and the collection counters alongside many other signals; use this tool for the focused collection dossier.

Dataset: collections · Domain: companies

name: companies_government_debtors_tool
description:
Returns government-debtor records for the queried
Brazilian company — appearances in public debt registries
(federal, state, municipal, or agency-specific) with
total debt value, debt count, per-origin breakdowns, and
per-debt detail.

Use when:
- "does this company owe the government?"
- "tax debt / public debt for this CNPJ"
- "is this CNPJ in any public debt registry?"
- "how much does this company owe, and to whom?"

Distinct from:
- companies_collections_tool — Sibling concept but different source — Collections covers private-sector collection processes; GovernmentDebtors covers public-sector debt registries.
- companies_kyc_tool — KYC sanctions may include some debt-related records, but this tool is focused specifically on public debt registries with monetary detail.

Dataset: government_debtors · Domain: companies
